title: AI Product Manager

must_haves.req: AI-native by default (Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable, n8n)
Builder track record: shipped AI products/prototypes/tools used by real people
must_haves.note: Has built agents for own use; less evidence of shipped products with an external user base.
No evidence of formal eval/observability/guardrail work — a core named workstream.

must_haves.req: Understanding of tool loops, planners, scaffolding, context management (agentic systems)
must_haves.note: Practical agent-building exposure via Claude Code but not productized agentic-system depth.

must_haves.req: Strong product instincts / prior PM experience
must_haves.note: No PM title or product-management track record; background is GTM/community/operator.
UK is a listed eligible location.

one_line_verdict: Genuinely open to earlier-career builders and AI-native, which keeps the door ajar, but no PM track record and no eval practice make it a stretch-to-plausible reach.
fetch_note: Full JD from api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/n8n (status open, UK among eligible locations). No hard degree/visa blocker, but the role is a product-management function Ryan has never held.
